features.name: DPI-C function import with parameter-sized unpacked array
features.description: Code should include a DPI-C import function declaration with an unpacked array parameter whose size is specified by a constant parameter expression
features.snippet:
parameter P_INPUT_DATA_LENGTH_MAX = 1000;
import "DPI-C" function int my_func(input byte unsigned dataIn[P_INPUT_DATA_LENGTH_MAX]);

features.name: dynamic array passed to DPI unpacked array parameter
features.description: Code should include a dynamic array being passed as an argument to a DPI-C function where the parameter expects an unpacked array

features.name: dynamic array assignment with new[] syntax
features.description: Code should include a dynamic array assigned using new[] constructor with input array as argument
